CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:MovieDetailScreen.kt:@Composable private fun MovieDetailContent( movie: MovieDetail, trailer: Video?, cast: List<Cast>, reviews: LazyPagingItems<Review>, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

ImportOrdering:MovieGraph.kt:import androidx.compose.runtime.LaunchedEffect import androidx.hilt.lifecycle.viewmodel.compose.hiltViewModel import androidx.navigation3.runtime.EntryProviderScope import androidx.navigation3.runtime.NavKey import com.muhiqbal.moviedb.feature.movie.list.MovieListRoute import com.muhiqbal.moviedb.feature.movie.list.MovieListViewModel import com.muhiqbal.moviedb.feature.movie.detail.MovieDetailRoute import com.muhiqbal.moviedb.feature.movie.detail.MovieDetailViewModel

LongMethod:ReviewItem.kt:@Composable fun ReviewItem( review: Review, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongMethod:SearchScreen.kt:@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun SearchScreen( query: String, onQueryChange: (String) -> Unit, results: LazyPagingItems<Movie>, onMovieClick: (Int) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )
MaxLineLength:MovieDetailScreen.kt:overview = "Super-assassin John Wick returns with a \$14 million price tag on his head and an army of bounty-hunting killers on his trail."
MaxLineLength:MovieListScreen.kt:overview = "A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O."
MaxLineLength:MovieListScreen.kt:overview = "After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more."
MaxLineLength:ReviewItem.kt:content = "A solid film with great performances. The pacing was a bit slow in the second act but overall it was worth watching."

MaxLineLength:ReviewItem.kt:content = "This movie was absolutely incredible! The visual effects were stunning and the story kept me on the edge of my seat throughout. Highly recommend to anyone who loves action-adventure films."
